name: GoChat
description: Custom chat backend. Local mode (built-in API, zero config) or relay mode (GoChat platform via WebSocket). Supports text, images, audio, video, and file attachments.

mode.description: local: built-in API server; relay: WebSocket relay via GoChat platform (default)

webhookSecret.description: Webhook signing secret (auto-generated for local mode)

directPort.description: Port for local mode HTTP server (default: 9750)

trustedAttachmentHosts.description: Extra trusted hosts for inbound attachment downloads. The relay host is trusted automatically.

gatewayAccess.description: Local gateway bootstrap policy for CLI/operator repair approval and loopback URL normalization.

autoApproveLocalRepair.description: Auto-approve safe local CLI operator repair requests that only ask for the standard full operator scopes.

normalizeLoopbackRemoteUrl.description: Rewrite loopback aliases such as openclaw.local to ws://127.0.0.1 so local gateway heuristics stay on the loopback path.

modeSwitchAuthorization.description: One-time authorization grant consumed by the next explicit local/relay mode switch.

targetMode.description: Which mode the next authorized switch may enter.

localAudioTranscription.description: Optional local audio transcription settings for inbound audio attachments.

enabled.description: Enable local transcription for inbound audio attachments (default: true)

model.description: Model name such as base, small, medium, or large-v3

language.description: Optional language hint such as zh or en

task.description: Transcribe in source language or translate to English

device.description: Device hint such as auto, cpu, cuda, or mps

computeType.description: Backend-specific compute type, mainly for faster-whisper

maxTranscriptChars.description: Maximum transcript characters injected into the agent context

channelId.description: Channel ID from GoChat relay platform (auto-registered)
